text: Leaving this space, I feel a quiet sense of closure. The environment, with its glass conference rooms and research displays, stirs in me a contemplative mood. As the echoes of 'see you in the next video' fade, I reflect on the transient nature of moments. This place, a blend of clarity and obscurity, reminds me how easy it is to lose focus and how quickly time moves forward. There is a touch of melancholy, but also curiosity for what the next encounter or idea might bring.
